title: get_card_elements Tauri Command
description: Returns the full recursive element tree for a top-level CDI group in a single call. Used by ElementCard to render the card body with all leaf fields and sub-groups inline (FR-011). Replaces multiple sequential get_column_items calls to meet SC-002 (<500ms).

nodeId.description: Node ID in dotted-hex format (e.g., '02.01.57.00.00.01'). Must match a key in the backend node cache.

groupPath.description: Full CDI navigation path from segment root to this group. Uses the same path encoding as get_column_items parentPath. For a replicated group instance, includes the instance selector (e.g., ['Port I/O', 'elem:2#3']).

errors: NodeNotFound: Node {nodeId} not found in cache
CdiNotRetrieved: CDI not yet retrieved for node {nodeId}
InvalidPath: Group path not found in CDI — {detail}

groupName.description: CDI group name; null if the group has no name attribute

groupDescription.description: CDI group description text; null if absent

fields.description: Leaf elements directly inside this group, in CDI document order

subGroups.description: Child sub-groups, in CDI document order, rendered inline and fully expanded (FR-011)

elementPath.description: Full CDI path from root to this element; used as key for readConfigValue and cache lookup

name.description: CDI element name attribute; display label in FieldRow

description.description: CDI element description text; hidden by default behind [?] expander (FR-012)

dataType.description: CDI element type; determines FieldRow vs EventSlotRow rendering and value formatting

memoryAddress.description: Absolute memory address within the node's memory space; passed to readConfigValue for [R] action

sizeBytes.description: Size of this element's value in bytes

defaultValue.description: CDI default value as a string representation; null if not specified

addressSpace.description: LCC memory space number (e.g., 253); matches parent segment's space field

groupPath.description: Full path to this sub-group from CDI root

fields.description: Leaf elements directly in this sub-group

subGroups.description: Nested sub-groups (recursive — supports arbitrary CDI depth)

examples.description: Fetch card elements for 'Line 3' instance of a replicated 'Line' group under 'Port I/O' segment

fields.name: Function Type
fields.description: How this output behaves when triggered

subGroups.name: Events
subGroups.description: Event IDs that control this output
